title: lestx's Barely Vanilla
description: lestx's Barely Vanilla preserves core vanilla gameplay while adding subtle visual polish, QoL conveniences and performance optimizations. Client & Server
body:
**lestx's Barely Vanilla -- Barely Changed. Sharply Polished.**

lestx's Barely Vanilla keeps Minecraft feeling like Minecraft. The goal is simple: preserve vanilla mechanics and balance while giving players a slightly cleaner look, smoother performance, and a handful of non-intrusive quality-of-life improvements. By design, this pack is conservative, with mostly clientside visual/animation/resource tweaks, QoL ergonomics, and performance tooling. This pack is intended to be installed on both client and server for the best, most consistent experience because a few bundled mods provide additional behavior when installed server-side.

**What this pack does**

- Keeps vanilla gameplay intact: no added biomes, major systems, or balance changes.
  
- Subtly improves visuals: Clean item and entity textures, gentle glows, nicer leaves and armor trim visuals, improved animations — all while retaining the vanilla art style.
  
- Makes play more ergonomic, including useful conveniences such as quick recipe lookup, smoother inventory handling, right-click crop harvest, centered crosshair, and clearer tooltips.
  
- Boosts performance. Modern Fabric optimizers reduce the rendering/tick load and memory pressure to make it smoother on low–mid hardware.
  
- Client & server aware. Some features are purely clientside (visuals/animations); others require server presence for correct behaviour — so install on both sides where possible.

**Key highlights**

- Performance gains from Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore, Entity Culling, Dynamic FPS, and several targeted optimizers.
  
- OptiFine-parity presentation - custom entity models, custom item textures, conditional textures, animation reworks - implemented via Fabric mods so resourcepacks can do modern visual tricks without OptiFine.
  
- QoL that doesn't change progression: JEI, MouseTweaks, RightClickHarvest, InvMove, ToolTipFix, and related small helpers.
  
- Polished: Glowing Nether portals, item enchantment glints, armor trim material, fancy leaves, light dynamics.

**Who this is for**

- Players who want a vanilla experience but with better FPS and tasteful visual polish.
  
- Hosts looking for a lightweight, consistent visual uplift for players, without changing server rules.
  
- People who prefer conservative packs — minimal gameplay risk, maximal playability.

**Credits & notes**

Every mod and resourcepack is the work of its original author. A full credits.txt is included in the pack with links and license information The pack is intentionally conservative — if you want radical gameplay changes, this is not that pack.
